title: Russia proved the world is still globalised
section_path: Russia proved the world is still globalised
section_path_text: Russia proved the world is still globalised
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Last week, the Monetary Policy Committee, the Bank of England's rate-setting body, decided to hike the basic interest rate by a quarter per cent. At 0.75% it still is very close to the all-time low and certainly far below any sort of inflation-fighting terminal interest rate. Nevertheless, comments from the Bank were relatively dovish.
